name: feature.analytics.agents
description: Analytics feature agent pack (ADR 0014) — a manifest agent whose tools are feature.analytics.nodes over the ctx.features.analytics surface. Summarizes a period's metrics into insights; tool-allowlisted to the Analytics feature surface only, and READ-ONLY (it reports, it does not mutate). Mirrors feature.kb.agents.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Analytics Insights
agents.description: Summarizes an org's analytics — traffic, top paths, UTM sources, conversion volume — into a concise insight report, grounded via feature.analytics.nodes.query over ctx.features.analytics. Read-only: it reports, it never mutates.
